prompt: Editorial product photography of a single consumer device on a neutral matte background, lit with soft directional north light, shallow depth of field, muted palette dominated by deep restrained green (#3a9e62), cool blue-grey (#7a9ab8), and warm ochre (#c8920a) accents. Composition isolated, calm, slightly overhead. Surface is brushed metal or unfinished concrete. Mood: honest, rigorous, considered. UK editorial sensibility, not American commercial gloss. No people. No text. No logos. No leaves, no plants, no recycling symbols. Photorealistic, 35mm prime lens look. --ar 3:2 --style raw --v 7
surface: anchor (Omni Reference master for all downstream assets)
notes: Run first. Pick best of 4 against §8 review gate. Upload chosen result somewhere addressable, then use that URL as --oref for assets 2–6.
